rationale: No conflict. Agric. Code §80.003 defines citrus pest management terms. Its sole Tax Code reference is to Chapter 23 agricultural-use appraisal, not to the §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption proposed for change.
quote: The term includes a person who owns land that is primarily used to grow citrus and that is appraised based on agricultural use under Chapter 23, Tax Code
_note: Proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no operative intersection with Agric. Code §80.003 definitions.
